text.title: Trunk-Based Branch by Abstraction Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the trunk-based-branch-by-abstraction methodology end-to-end.

step.name: create-abstraction
step.action: Define Protocol/interface that captures the operation. Update call sites to depend on the abstraction.

step.name: wrap-old
step.action: Wrap legacy code to satisfy the interface. Confirm all tests green with old implementation behind the abstraction.

step.name: implement-new
step.action: Implement new code behind the same interface. Tests cover both paths. Flag default = off.

step.name: flag-gated-swap-with-dark-launch
step.action: Ramp 0% -> < 1% -> 10% -> 50% -> 100% with validation at each step (diurnal cycle minimum at < 1%). Compare outputs.
step.decision-gate: STOP if match-rate below threshold; investigate before next ramp.

step.name: remove-old-and-collapse
step.action: Delete legacy implementation + flag block + wrapper. Collapse abstraction to direct call where appropriate.
